description: CompositionDark coral pink ethnic print kurta made of 100% cotton, has three-quarter sleeves, round neck, printed border panel on the sleeve hems, printed panel extending from the neckline to the bust that has beaded detailing, mock placket and a vented hemFittingRegularWash careWash dark colours separatelyDo not bleachDry inside out in shadeWarm ironThis piece of art by aurelia is designed to accentuate your femininity. Look stylish in this ethnic kurta and revel in the comfort of the soft fabric. Pair it with leggings and heels for a formal look or wear it when hanging out with your friends by teaming it with denims and flats for a casual look.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in kurtisHeight-5.7", Chest-33", Waist-26"
